## Testing

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `python -m compileall -q src tests`
- [ ] Manual CLI smoke test, if behavior changed

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] Examples and tests use fake values only.
- [ ] Reports and findings do not include raw sensitive values.
- [ ] Input files are not modified in place.
- [ ] No telemetry, network behavior, or unnecessary dependency was added.
